published.text:
Badge: Follow-Up Examples

Headline:
Lead Follow-Up Automation Examples for Small Business

Hero intro:
Speed to lead is the single biggest predictor of whether you close a deal. Research consistently shows that businesses responding within 5 minutes are 8x more likely to qualify a lead than those responding within 30 minutes. But consistent, fast follow-up is nearly impossible manually. These are the exact follow-up automation workflows that service businesses use to respond instantly and follow up consistently.

Hero subtext:
Below: specific follow-up workflows with trigger, timing, and message examples — organized by channel and use case.

Section titles:
- Instant response workflows
- Multi-step follow-up sequences
- Follow-up timing benchmarks (table)
- Follow-up automation best practices

CTA heading: Stop losing leads to slow follow-up

edits.description: Opens with data: "8x more likely to qualify" — establishes urgency with research
Each workflow includes trigger, timing, and example message
Named patterns: "5-touch lead nurture (14 days)", "Quote follow-up sequence (7 days)"
Table uses conversion impact data with specific targets
Best practices section: non-negotiable first (stop on reply), then value-add guidance
Concrete response rates cited: "40-60% response rate", "20-35% conversion"
Interlinks: AI lead follow-up, missed call follow-up, instant lead response, email sequence

closer.text: CTA heading: Stop losing leads to slow follow-up
